name: OpenAI o1-pro
archDisplay: Dense transformer reasoning model, extended test-time compute (exact size undisclosed); ChatGPT Pro-exclusive configuration of o1, not a separate architecture
note: Higher-compute configuration of o1, launched alongside the full o1 model and the $200/mo ChatGPT Pro tier on Dec 5, 2024; added to the API on March 25, 2025 at $150/$600 per M tokens (10x o1's output price). Later superseded by o3-pro (already in corpus).

results.notes: AIME 2024, approximate ('~86%'); uplift from base o1's 74.4% (already in corpus as 74.3 on AIME 2024) driven by increased inference-time compute, not a different model

verificationNotes: Existence and Dec 5, 2024 ChatGPT Pro launch confirmed by SiliconANGLE, VentureBeat, and TheAlgorithmicBridge coverage of the ChatGPT Pro announcement (all independently reporting the same date and $200/mo tier). Context window (200K), max output (100K), pricing ($150/$600 per M), and text+image-in/text-out modalities confirmed by direct fetch of developers.openai.com/api/docs/models/o1-pro. API-only availability from March 25, 2025 confirmed by chatforest.com's o1/o1-pro comparison review. AIME 2024 uplift (~74% for o1 -> ~86% for o1-pro) cross-confirmed by two independent secondary sources (chatforest.com review and a separate WebSearch-surfaced synthesis); could not find an official OpenAI-published GPQA or Codeforces number specifically isolated for o1-pro (only qualitative claims of 'improved' performance and a low-confidence unconfirmed '+3%' GPQA claim), so those rows were omitted per the 'omit rather than guess' instruction.
